title.en: China-to-EU Textiles & Apparel Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国纺织品及服装进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國紡織品及服裝進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China textile and apparel documentation against EU REACH restricted substances, Textile Labelling Regulation (EU) 1007/2011, General Product Safety Regulation (EU) 2023/988, children's cord safety EN 14682, and POPs restrictions. Note: textiles are NOT CE-marked.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国纺织品及服装文件与欧盟REACH限制物质、纺织品标签法规（EU）1007/2011、一般产品安全法规（EU）2023/988、儿童绳带安全EN 14682及POPs限制的差距对照。注意：纺织品无需CE标志。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國紡織品及服裝文件與歐盟REACH限制物質、紡織品標籤法規（EU）1007/2011、一般產品安全法規（EU）2023/988、兒童繩帶安全EN 14682及POPs限制的差距對照。注意：紡織品無需CE標誌。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, chemical laboratory assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and brands should verify current EU law, REACH Annex XVII restrictions, textile labelling requirements, and applicable harmonised standards with qualified legal and technical professionals before shipment. Regulatory text is evolving; always consult the current consolidated version of each regulation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、化学实验室评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和品牌方在出货前应与合格法律及技术专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、REACH附件XVII限制、纺织品标签要求及适用协调标准。法规文本持续更新，请务必参阅各法规现行整合版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、化學實驗室評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和品牌方在出貨前應與合格法律及技術專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、REACH附件XVII限制、紡織品標籤要求及適用協調標準。法規文本持續更新，請務必參閱各法規現行整合版本。

answer_first.en: EU textiles are NOT CE-marked. The four main compliance gaps for Chinese textile and apparel exporters entering the EU are: (1) REACH Annex XVII chemical restrictions — particularly NPE (nonylphenol ethoxylates) and CMR substances not covered by GB 18401; (2) Fibre composition labelling in EU official language(s) per Regulation (EU) 1007/2011 with an EU-established economic operator named on the label; (3) General Product Safety Regulation (EU) 2023/988 (GPSR, from 13 Dec 2024) — EU contact information on product/packaging, traceability identifiers, and technical documentation; (4) POPs restrictions (PFOS/PFOA/SCCPs) in functional textiles under Regulation (EU) 2019/1021.
answer_first.zh: 欧盟纺织品无需CE标志。中国纺织品及服装出口商进入欧盟的四大主要合规差距：（1）REACH附件XVII化学品限制——尤其是GB 18401未涵盖的NPE（壬基苯酚乙氧基化物）和CMR物质；（2）依据法规（EU）1007/2011，须以欧盟官方语言标注纤维成分，并在标签上注明欧盟注册经营主体；（3）一般产品安全法规（EU）2023/988（GPSR，自2024年12月13日起）——产品/包装须有欧盟联系信息、可追溯标识符及技术文件；（4）依据法规（EU）2019/1021，功能性纺织品中PFOS/PFOA/SCCPs的POPs限制。
answer_first.zht: 歐盟紡織品無需CE標誌。中國紡織品及服裝出口商進入歐盟的四大主要合規差距：（1）REACH附件XVII化學品限制——尤其是GB 18401未涵蓋的NPE（壬基苯酚乙氧基化物）和CMR物質；（2）依據法規（EU）1007/2011，須以歐盟官方語言標注纖維成分，並在標籤上注明歐盟註冊經營主體；（3）一般產品安全法規（EU）2023/988（GPSR，自2024年12月13日起）——產品/包裝須有歐盟聯繫信息、可追溯標識符及技術文件；（4）依據法規（EU）2019/1021，功能性紡織品中PFOS/PFOA/SCCPs的POPs限制。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. EUR-Lex, ECHA, CEN, and official national authority sources. Local PDFs and secondary summaries are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
